rule_text: The commit message body explains why the change was made.

target.value:
fix(classifier): switch to longest-match dispatch

Greedy first-match was selecting `github_pr_open` over `github_non_author_approval`
because the former's pattern was registered first. Reproduced in #211 against a
draft PR; longest-match resolves it without breaking existing rule fixtures.

notes: Body names the failure mode (greedy first-match), the reproducer (#211), and why the fix is safe.
